workstreams.write_owner: ChatGPT project: HELIX — Governed Agent Engineering
workstreams.scope: Reconcile PR #25 as merged and CI-verified, release its implementation branch ownership, and clarify HELIX as the umbrella conversational workspace with ServiceTracer as the bounded repository workstream. Permitted paths: .project/active-work.json, .project/workstream-catalog.json, .project/README.md, .project/environment-state.json, .project/handoffs/current-state.md, .helix/repository-context.json, .helix/CHATGPT-PROJECT-BOUNDARY.md, docs/implementation-status.md, and README.md.
workstreams.next_gate: Open a pull request and pass repository CI for structural state validation, existing ServiceTracer tests, replacement-design tests, and Bicep build. No Azure workflow dispatch, workflow promotion, replacement execution, or billing mutation is authorized.

known_open_pull_requests.action: Do not treat as current implementation work. Review for unique durable evidence, then close as superseded through a separate explicit action.

required_gates: independent evidence-quality review of the merged fail-closed design
rollback strategy and canonical OS-disk naming are selected and tested
pre-maintenance guest and control-plane evidence schema is defined
NIC preservation and identity/RBAC restoration are bounded
temporary-resource cost estimate, owner, and cleanup deadline are reviewed
promotion occurs through a separate authority-changing pull request
next_bounded_operation.next_gate: After this reconciliation merges, perform the four scoped reviews and resolve rollback in separate bounded repository work. Do not move the candidate into .github/workflows, dispatch it, or add Azure mutation commands.
